text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This field is new, starting with the 2023 service year. It is not populated in earlier years.
